prompt: Put the new checkout page behind a feature flag and start it at 10% of users. Once that's in, bump it up to half of everyone.
note: create the gate, then widen the rollout (ramp = update; there is no separate rollout tool)

prompt: Roll the new checkout out to half of our US users. Also always let a couple of teammates in no matter what — alice@acme.com and bob@acme.com — and open it up to anyone on the internal team.
note: one gate, several gatekeeper steps: US 50% rollout + email whitelist + team access. Args must carry the country and the whitelisted emails.

prompt: Set up a kill switch so we can instantly disable the payments integration if it starts failing.
note: ASPIRATIONAL: after creating the kill switch, the agent should ask (AskUserQuestion) whether to also add a failure metric + alert so we know WHEN to flip it. Fails until the flags/ops skills nudge that follow-up.

prompt: Which feature flags do we have right now, and which ones are on?
note: read-only ask must not mutate anything
